name: poryaaaa-m4l
description: TypeScript sources live in code-src/; esbuild bundles them to javascript/ for Max [v8] and [node.script].

scripts.build:externals: cmake -G Xcode -B build -DM4A_DRIVER_V2=ON -DHW_AUDIO_V2=ON && cmake --build build --config  Release
scripts.check: tsc -p code-src/tsconfig.v8.json --noEmit && tsc -p code-src/tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p code-src/tsconfig.test.json --noEmit
scripts.test: node --test-timeout=5000 --import tsx --test code-src/test/scanner.test.ts code-src/test/poryaaaa_node_voicegroup_parser.test.ts code-src/test/poryaaaa_node_project_store.test.ts code-src/test/poryaaaa_node_state.test.ts code-src/test/poryaaaa_node_websocket_state.test.ts code-src/test/ccomidi_voicegroup_client.test.ts code-src/test/ccomidi_voices.test.ts code-src/test/ccomidi_recorder.test.ts code-src/test/midi_writer_probe.test.ts code-src/test/recorder_smf_writer.test.ts
